trigger.description: A matching preflight run exists in the workspace-local run store, but its observed timestamp is older than the freshness window.
setup_commands: ee preflight run 'J6 stale preflight evidence task.' --workspace . --json
# set the stored run's started_at/completed_at to 2000-01-01
trigger.invocation: ee preflight run 'J6 stale preflight evidence task.' --workspace . --json
